title: Agent Traces, GenAI Semantics, Token Usage, Cost, Privacy, and Diagnosis · Program Brief: Content Logging Policy
summary: Logs contain full prompts and secrets but omit tool arguments, approvals, retries, model version, token usage, cost, and causal links needed to diagnose a failure. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the content logging policy increment in privacy-safe reconstructable agent telemetry. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theor…
objectives: Default to metadata and hashes; sample, minimize, redact, encrypt, access-control, retain, and delete prompt, result, and tool content only when approved.
Apply versioned OpenTelemetry GenAI operation, provider, model, usage, tool, workflow, error, and output attributes with stability awareness.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-content-logging-policy — Default to metadata and hashes; sample, minimize, redact, encrypt, access-control, retain, and delete prompt, result, and tool content only when approved.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-observability-token-cost-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-observability-token-cost-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_observability_token_cost_4(invocations: int = 40, traced_invocations: int = 40, usage_records: int = 40, redacted_records: int = 40, unbounded_content_logs: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if invocations < 1 or traced_invocations < 0:
        return False, traced_invocations, "trace-count"
    if traced_invocations != invocations or usage_records != invocations:
        return False, usage_records, "telemetry-gap"
    if redacted_records != invocations:
        return False, redacted_records, "telemetry-redaction"
    if unbounded_content_logs > 0:
        return False, unbounded_content_logs, "content-log-leak"
    assert traced_invocations == invocations and usage_records == invocations
    return True, traced_invocations, "observable-agent-operations"

Build deterministic Python evidence to emit reconstructable agent, model, tool, approval, retry, token, latency, cost, error, and privacy-safe trace evidence; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Default to metadata and hashes; sample, minimize, redact, encrypt, access-control, retain, and delete prompt, result, and tool content only when approved.
